what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon of a location pin with a circular center marker.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
Rendering is stroke-based with fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round caps and round joins.
The pin outline is drawn with one path element, and the inner marker is drawn with one circle element.
standouts: Uses currentColor so the icon inherits text or parent color.
Keeps the icon as two geometric SVG elements: one pin path and one center circle.
Uses a compact single-line SVG definition.
conventions: Follows common 24px outline icon markup conventions.
Uses rounded stroke caps and joins for a softer outline style.
Avoids hardcoded color values by using currentColor.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present in the SVG markup.
notes: This file is a standalone stroke-based location pin icon asset.
questions: Is the icon intended to be decorative, labeled by surrounding UI, or given accessibility metadata at render time?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a location pin icon, and the SVG content draws a location pin icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, themeable location marker icon for interfaces.
contribution: Contributes a compact currentColor location marker asset with a pin silhouette and center dot that can be retained as a reusable navigation or place indicator.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px currentColor SVG outline icon showing a location pin with a circular center marker.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing location, place, or map-related UI actions in a themeable icon set.
